examples: You need to put aside your differences with Sayid.
Sayid: It's our anniversary. We have to find the perfect place.
Sayid Tussadau Hussein(ph) was just one of the millions of Pakistanis made homeless by the disaster.
Mr. SAYID TUSSADAU HUSSEIN: (Through Translator) Yes, it would have been much better for us if the border was open.
